# Copilot instructions

This repo follows the AGENTS.md standard. Read [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)
for the full project brief.

## TL;DR

- Pure HTML + Reveal.js. **No build step. No React, Vite, or Next.js.**
- Slides are sequential `<section>` blocks in `template/index.html`.
- Every slide needs the chrome (logo top-left + footer counter).
- Light slides use `*_LIGHT.png` logos; dark slides use `*_DARK.png`.
- When adding/removing a slide, update every footer `NN / MM` counter.
- Don't edit `examples/cursor-nexo-security/` — it's preserved verbatim.

For full conventions, layout helpers, and theme tokens, see AGENTS.md.
